message:
🐛 fix: standardize loading states across Network, Storage, Deployment, Helm cards (#8532)

Replace custom loading text/spinners with the standard CardWrapper skeleton
pattern. Cards now return null when showSkeleton is true, letting CardWrapper
handle skeleton rendering consistently. Remove inline loading states that
caused sequential loading flashes and footer text that flickered during
background refresh.

Fixes #8513, Fixes #8514, Fixes #8517, Fixes #8523, Fixes #8524

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
